What Is Crazy Time?

Crazy Time is a live casino game developed by Evolution Gaming, launched in 2020. It combines a money wheel format with four interactive bonus rounds, delivering one of the most engaging live casino experiences available today.

Parameter
Details
Game Name
Crazy Time
Provider
Evolution Gaming
RTP
96.08%
Release Year
2020
Game Type
Live Game Show
Min Bet
$0.10
Max Bet
$5,000
Volatility
High

How to Play Crazy Time Game

The Crazy Time live game follows a straightforward format:

  1. Place your bet on one or more wheel segments before the timer runs out
  2. Watch the wheel spin — a live host manages the entire session in real time
  3. Win if the wheel lands on your chosen segment
  4. Trigger a bonus round if the flapper lands on a bonus segment

Wheel Segments Breakdown

Segment
Occurrences on Wheel
Multiplier

21
1x
2
13
2x
5

5x
10

10x

4
Up to 2000x
Cash Hunt
2
Up to 10,000x
Pachinko
2
Up to 10,000x
Crazy Time
1
Up to 20,000x

Crazy Time Bonus Rounds

🎯 Cash Hunt

A shooting gallery with 108 random multipliers hidden behind symbols. Players pick one to reveal their prize.

🪙 Coin Flip

A simple double-sided coin is flipped. Each side displays a multiplier — red or blue. Fast, clean, exciting.

🎰 Pachinko

A giant physical Pachinko wall drops a puck from the top. It bounces through pegs and lands on a multiplier at the bottom. Can double infinitely until a non-double multiplier is hit.

🎪 Crazy Time (Bonus)

The main event. A massive virtual wheel with three flappers spins inside a digital world. Players pick a flapper before the spin. The highest potential reward reaches 20,000x.

Crazy Time Game Rules: Key Points

  • You can bet on multiple segments simultaneously
  • The Top Slot above the main wheel adds a multiplier or triggers bonus entry with boosted multipliers
  • If you didn't bet on a bonus segment but it lands, you are still entered into the bonus (at minimum multiplier)
  • All bonus multipliers are multiplied by your original bet, not just a flat reward

Crazy Time Live Stats & Results

Understanding Crazy Time stats helps inform your session decisions. Most platforms display a live stats tracker directly in the game interface.

Typical Stats You'll See:

  • Last 100 spins results — distribution of each segment landing
  • Bonus frequency — how often each bonus round was triggered
  • Multiplier history — top multipliers awarded in recent rounds
  • Hot & cold segments — visual indicators of segment frequency
Pro tip: The Crazy Time stats tracker is not a predictive tool — past results do not influence future spins. The RNG and live wheel operate independently each round.

Why Play Crazy Time Online?

🏆 Pros:

  • Exceptional production quality from Evolution Gaming
  • Four distinct bonus games — never repetitive
  • Massive max multiplier potential (up to 20,000x)
  • Available 24/7 at virtually every major live casino online
  • Transparent live stats tracker built into the interface

⚠️ Cons:

  • High volatility — long losing streaks are possible
  • True demo play is unavailable (live format limitation)
  • Top multipliers are rare by design

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Crazy Time a game of skill or chance?

Crazy Time is primarily a game of chance. While players can use stats and tracking tools to better understand recent outcomes, every round remains independent.

What is the maximum multiplier in Crazy Time?

The maximum advertised potential in Crazy Time can reach up to 20,000x during the main Crazy Time bonus round.

Can I join bonus rounds if I did not bet directly on them?

If the game rules and current setup allow it through bonus mechanics such as minimum entry or Top Slot effects, players may still enter certain bonus outcomes with a reduced multiplier.

Are Crazy Time live stats predictive?

No. Live stats help visualize recent activity, but they do not predict future outcomes. Each spin is independent.
